scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:vercel: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
